description: Using the 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' dataset (located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx') in Oracle Analytics Desktop, create a workbook that analyzes revenue by day type. Create a calculated column named 'Day Type' to classify 'Order Date' as 'Weekend' (Saturday and Sunday) or 'Weekday' (Monday through Friday). Visualize 'Sales' by 'Day Type' using a Donut Chart titled 'Revenue Share: Weekend vs Weekday'. Save the completed workbook as 'Weekend_Analysis' to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Weekend_Analysis.dva'.
